architecturalHighlights.category: Frontend UI Batching & Express Process Resilience
architecturalHighlights.keyRemediation: Implemented batched object state updaters to resolve React 18 stale closure double-click failures and configured permanent systemd user daemon recovery ledgers.
Enforced Optimistic Concurrency Control (OCC) If-Match ETag headers on all SQL writes and added compound B-Tree indexing on (company, use_case_name, priority_score).
Engineered mTLS Private Service Connect (PSC) transit tunnels to Snowflake/S3 data lakes to eradicate TCP socket starvation over corporate VPNs.

architecturalHighlights.category: GxP Regulatory Sovereignty & Cloud DLP Masking
architecturalHighlights.keyRemediation: Executed inline Cloud DLP automated regex masking to sanitize 100% of patient MRNs/names and attached SHA-256 HMAC non-repudiation electronic signatures per FDA 21 CFR Part 11.
Decoupled massive spreadsheet/PDF document compilation into standalone background Web Workers and upgraded absolute modal widths to fluid clamp() containers.

architecturalHighlights.category: Dynamic Comment Weaving & Live WebAudio Sync
architecturalHighlights.keyRemediation: Constructed dynamic Comment-Box Extraction Engine that parses custom notes into final executive reports and optimized Three.js 52-blendshape ARKit avatar lip-sync buffers.
